creator: alumina@ceramix.compress.to
text:
Created attachment 239652
DSD-native support patches for FreeBSD-13.1

I creating DSD-native playback patches for FreeBSD and ports/audio/musicpd.
Testing playback on flac123, mpg321 and DSD-native supported musicpd.

Click noise detect in silence interval of music on high-resolution headphones.
It's little noise, I can't detect noise on my speaker.
If Windows7, noise is not detected.

High-sample-rate is more noise cycles.

Help!

some info:(dmesg)
uaudio_chan_play_sync_callback: Value = 0x00160bf8
uaudio_chan_play_sync_callback: Comparing 176374 Hz :: 176400 Hz

Thanks.
